reviews.originalComment: Harga terjangkau dengan fasilitas yg msh terjaga..sangat rekomendasi utk kamu yg mau menginap dgn hrg yg variatif dan fasilitas yg baik
reviews.reviewComments: Affordable prices with well-maintained facilities... highly recommended for those who want to stay at varied prices and with good amenities.

reviews.reviewPositives: Though the room is small but it's clean and well designed.

reviews.reviewComments:
I stayed here one night as I was catching the 1st ferry to Pulau Weh.
The staff are friendly and helpful.
My room was spacious with hot running water in the bathroom.
In the lobby and on all floors theirs drinking water.
My Home is located close to local setting places that are amazing value for money.
The homestay is quiet with  no traffic noise and it's clean. There is a mosque close by. The call to prayer in the morning only lasts 10 - 15 minutes. Had I not been awake I would not have heard it.
I would stay here again.
Remember you are in Indonesia. It is basic.

reviews.reviewPositives: This is my 2nd time staying here. I prefer this place is mainly due to the location & accessibility to nearby eateries and shops

reviews.reviewComments:
The first room I was given had very poor WiFi reception. But I was able to change to another one with was much better. Both rooms are on the second floor.
There is cold and relatively hot water dispenser on every floor.

reviews.reviewTitle: Unless you’re extremely broke don’t stay here spend a little extra and get a nicer place.
reviews.reviewPositives: The room was clean I guess
reviews.reviewNegatives: Very small, extremely basic, they said there was Internet but none of us could connect which was disappointing.

reviews.reviewTitle: Best budget location to stay in Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Located in a small complex near the city center. For the price, it’s considered very decent. Worth the stay

reviews.reviewTitle: i will stay here in future

reviews.reviewComments: Recommended to stay in Acheh for location assesible to nearest food & souvenir facilities

reviews.reviewTitle: Good for solo travellers with a controlled budget
reviews.reviewPositives:
Staff was polite and tried to help in whatever way they could.
Bathroom size was larger than expected and comfortable, if we compare it to the room size.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Internet was quite slow. 

 Room size that I selected was small if you have one large check in luggage plus one carry-on,  as it will take up the space on ground and leave little room to walk around.

reviews.reviewComments: Hotel bajet terbaik

reviews.reviewTitle: Disappointing communication and did not meet agreements made
reviews.reviewNegatives: We booked this accomodation basically to store our luggages. Unfortunately our flight was cancelled and we couldn't make it to Banda aceh. The hotel agreed to not let us pay given these unforeseen circumstances, but finally they did charge us. Communication was overall very difficult.

reviews.reviewComments: I will recommend my home if you are looking for a simple accommodation at a center of the town.

reviews.reviewPositives: The place is clean and has an excellent location.
reviews.reviewNegatives: There is no elevator but if you travel light that should be OK or you can ask for a room on the ground floor when booking.

reviews.reviewComments:
Very strategic location.

Wifi was so 👎

reviews.reviewPositives: Location quite central to shops and restaurant
reviews.reviewNegatives: Room aircond not working properly. Takes forever to cool down.

reviews.reviewComments: feel likes home
Recommended to budget travel. Nearby to mosque . Walking distance to food court and restoran nearby. Cimb Niagabank infront the hotel.
Very clean, excellent service, great location
Near to city center, can just walk around. Room is spacious and clean!

reviews.reviewTitle: Decent budget hotel in Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Stayed one night at My Home Aceh. On check in the room wasn't ready which wasn't a big deal. Cleanliness of the place was okay. Staff at the hotel was helpful and tried there best to overcome the language barrier. Overall it was an okay stay.
Very clean and easy access to all important landmarks.

Clean and spacious room. The staff is helpful. Few meters away from the mainroad.
The water pressure is low. No lift. Only soap provided in the bathroom. 
Otherwise we had a nice stay there.

Located at the back of shophouses along Peunayong Street. A simple, no frills place but really serve its purpose. Clean room. Newly renovated bathroom. Comfy bed & pillow. Hot/Cold water dispenser are available in every floor. Very friendly and super helpful staff. Room was a bit small but didn’t matter for me bcoz i only be there for sleeping. There are many cafès and eateries around. Only 5 minutes walk to nearest money changer and souvenir shops. Easy to get Grab service too (if ‘MyHome’ doesn’t appear on your current location, just type ‘Seirama Coffee Shop’ - next door cafe)....the only disadvantage, no elevator.

My Home Aceh is a very good budget hotel, well located downtown Aceh, with a kind, knowledgeable and helpful staff. I will stay with them again if I am ever in Banda Aceh and what good, clean basic accommodation.
The hotel should upgrade the problem of the wifi connection. Its too poor connection. Overall is okay and nice. Thanks for the warm hospitality
Good place to stay for travel. Near to the souvenir and food court. Nice for budget hotel. Not recommend if vacation with older because room was too small

The room was small but ok for the price. The bathroom was clean and modern. But I was given a room at the building where they are still doing A LOT OF construction. Imagine waking up at eight in the morning from people cutting tiles using a very loud machine in the next room. The workers also constantly banging on the wall of my room while putting nails on the wall. I don't k ow why they put me in this building. Maybe because I'm Indonesian with brown skin. If I were a white tourist I'm sure they would've given me a room in the building where there is no construction.
Thoroughly enjoyed the stay. Will come back in the future
Location is central, room is clean and spacious though no other facilities.

reviews.reviewTitle: Bagus & Berbaloi.. Value for money, central location
reviews.reviewComments: Even before our arrival, they were very responsive to text messages and helpful to queries on estimated fares from the port to the hotel. We were allowed early check in, so kind of them. Plenty of food choices in the area and coffee places. There's a water dispenser on each floor. Toilet very clean. Beds were firm and comfy. AC functioned well n strong. Great value!

reviews.reviewTitle: good hotel, excellent location in Chinatown
reviews.reviewComments: Actually two hotels  one budget and the other a bit more upscale. Friendly staff. Good food all around
Located in center city, friendly staff, ac working very well, hot water, clean bed sheet..for me it is just excellent

reviews.originalComment: My Home emang selalu memberikan layanan terbaik, kamar yg bersih dan Kondisi toilet yg Rapi dan baik
reviews.reviewComments: My Home really provides the best service, clean rooms, and well-maintained and tidy bathrooms.
Clean room, good facilities.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good solid choice but misleading description
reviews.reviewComments: A well maintained budget hotel that was very comfortable. The only thing was that the Agoda description stated the room had a double and a single, but we got 2 single beds ( we were 3 people and it didn’t work).  I had to pay extra for another bed, though they gave me a discount for the misunderstanding. They insisted they don’t list family rooms on Agoda but it clearly stated I would be getting a double and single. It was still economical with the surcharge, though I should have received what was stated.
Sehr freundliches Personal.  Es gibt viele Restaurants und Shops in der Nähe.
Bagus dan dekat dengan pusat kota

Lokasi yg Sgt dekat dgn byk kedai. 
Saya berjalan2 Di sekitar hotel sekitar pkol 11mlm dgn rasa selamat Dan tenang (3 org perempuan). 
Staff hotel pulang kan balik barang yg saya tertinggal dlm hotel dgn Keadaan selamat Dan baik
.
Hotel ni tiada lift. Lain2 semuanya terbaik.
A place i call home
Hotel okay, bilik besar,bersih.
